title: Rainy Day Conversation
content: Heavy rain surprised Olivia and Jake while they were walking home. They found shelter under the roof of a small bookstore. As they waited for the rain to stop, they talked about childhood memories, favorite books, and places they wanted to visit. Time passed so quickly that neither of them noticed the rain had already ended. Jake smiled and said, “Maybe we should thank the weather.” Olivia laughed because she knew that unexpected conversation had brought them much closer together.
